sourcesContent:
import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { first } from 'rxjs/operators'; import { AccountService, StatsService, AlertService } from '@app/_services'; import { Role } from '@app/_models'; import { environment } from '@environments/environment'; @Component({ templateUrl: 'home.component.html', standalone: false }) export class HomeComponent implements OnInit { stats: any = null; loading = false; Role = Role; downloadUrl = `${environment.apiUrl}/documentation-pdf`; constructor( private accountService: AccountService, private statsService: StatsService, private alertService: AlertService ) {} get account() { return this.accountService.accountValue; } ngOnInit() { this.loading = true; this.statsService.getStats() .pipe(first()) .subscribe({ next: data => { this.stats = data; this.loading = false; }, error: error => { this.alertService.error('Could not load dashboard statistics.'); this.loading = false; } }); } }

Dashboard Overview

Welcome back, {{account?.firstName}} {{account?.lastName}}! Here is your organization summary.

Total Accounts
{{stats.accountsCount}}
Employees Roster
{{stats.empsCount}}
Departments
{{stats.deptsCount}}
Pending Tickets
{{stats.pendingReqsCount}}
Submitted Tickets
{{stats.totalRequests}}
Pending Tickets
{{stats.pendingCount}}
Approved Tickets
{{stats.approvedCount}}
Quick Actions
Register New User Account Add Employee Record Add Division Department Submit Asset / Access Request Edit Account Settings
Performance Index
Employee Data Integrity {{ ((stats.empsCount / (stats.accountsCount || 1)) * 100).toFixed(0) }}% synced
Ticket Approval Rate {{ stats.totalRequests ? ((stats.approvedCount / stats.totalRequests) * 100).toFixed(0) : 100 }}% approved
System Server Health 100% Online

Technical Documentation & Architecture Specs

Generate and download the compiled system report including backend database schemas, Express API controllers, and frontend routing tables in a professional PDF document.

Download PDF
